LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS 2623 PACIFIC LLC, AND PAUL CHOW'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE CONTINUED FROM APR-27-2006 TO LAW AND MOTION AT MAY-12-2006, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. ARGUED AND CONTINUED TO 5/12/06. PETITIONER IS TO FILE A 4-PAGE SUPPLEMENT BRIEF ON THE ROSS CASE WITH COURTESY COPY TO DEPARTMENT 301 BY 5/2/06. RESPONDENT'S REPLY IS DUE BY 5/5/06. EACH SIDE IS TO E-MAIL A STATEMENT OF DECISION TO THE COURT'S RESEACH ATTORNEY BY 5/12/06. THIS MATTER WILL BE DEEMED SUBMITTED ON 5/12/06. NO APPEARANCE IS NECESSARY ON 5/12/06. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar May-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONERS 2623 PACIFIC LLC and PAUL CHOW'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE IS DEEMED SUBMITTED. NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY. =(301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Petitioner'S Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Continued To May-12-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew M. Zacks, Esq., of Zacks Utrecht & Leadbetter, 956-8100, for Petitioner and Moving Party
Susan Cleveland-Knowles, Deputy City Attorney, 554-6769, for Respondent and Opposing Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONERS 2623 PACIFIC LLC, and PAUL CHOW'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE is continued to 5/12/06. Petitioner is to file a 4-page supplement brief on the Ross Case with courtesy copy to Department 301 by 5/2/06. Respondent's reply is due by 5/5/06. Each side is to e-mail a Statement of Decision to the court's reseach attorney by 5/12/06. This matter will be deemed submitted on 5/12/06. No appearance is necessary on 5/12/06. (301/JLW/ds) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS 2623 PACIFIC LLC AND PAUL CHOW'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. Court finds service was proper, and no opposition was filed. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
